CREATE TABLE test_timestamp (id INT, ts TIMESTAMP(3));
INSERT INTO test_timestamp VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:30:15.123');
INSERT INTO test_timestamp VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 08:45:20.456');
INSERT INTO test_timestamp VALUES (3, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03 16:00:30.789');
SELECT id, ts FROM test_timestamp WHERE ts IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(ts) FROM test_timestamp;
SELECT MIN(ts) FROM test_timestamp;
SELECT id FROM test_timestamp WHERE ts BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 00:00:00.000' AND TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 23:59:59.999';
SELECT id FROM test_timestamp WHERE ts >= TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:30:15.123' AND ts <= TIMESTAMP '2023-10-03 16:00:30.789';
CREATE TABLE test_join (id INT, timestamp_reference TIMESTAMP(3));
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, (SELECT ts FROM test_timestamp WHERE id = 1));
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (2, (SELECT ts FROM test_timestamp WHERE id = 2));
SELECT tj.id, tj.timestamp_reference FROM test_join tj INNER JOIN test_timestamp ts ON tj.timestamp_reference = ts.ts;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_timestamp WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ts) = 2023;
SELECT id, ts, EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM ts) AS minute FROM test_timestamp ORDER BY minute;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id INT, ts TIMESTAMP(6));
INSERT INTO test_complex VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:30:15.123456');
INSERT INTO test_complex VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 08:45:20.654321');
SELECT tc.id FROM test_complex tc WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_timestamp WHERE ts = tc.ts);
SELECT tc.id, tc.ts FROM test_complex tc WHERE tc.ts < (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM test_timestamp);
